overall.description: Third-person game footage of a character walking through a dark rocky canyon toward a natural archway at dusk. The character passes through the arch into an open coastal area dominated by giant skeletal remains, approaching a figure standing on a distant hill under a purple sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon passage leading to natural arch

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow rocky canyon toward the distant archway

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation forming the left wall of the canyon
tall dark rock formation forming the right wall of the canyon
massive natural stone archway visible in the distance ahead
dark wet sand with reflective puddles covering the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky canyon with tall dark walls on both sides. The ground is wet dark sand with reflective puddles. Ahead, a massive natural rock archway is visible in the distance under a purple dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: natural rock archway with giant skeletal remains

events.description: character enters the shadow of the massive rock archway
giant skeletal ribs become prominent and dominate the view ahead

agents.ego_description: passing through the rock archway and approaching the giant skeletal remains

entered.detail: massive curved bones of a giant creature forming an arching structure
smaller bone fragments scattered on the sand

segments.scene_description: The character passes under the massive rock archway, transitioning from the enclosed canyon to a more open area. Giant skeletal ribs of a massive creature become visible ahead, arching over the path. The canyon walls fall away as the character moves through the arch.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal area with skeletal remains and distant figure

events.description: exits the archway into the open coastal area with giant bones
approaching the figure standing on the rocky hill ahead

agents.ego_description: walking past the giant bones toward a figure standing on the rocky hill ahead

notable_agents.action: standing motionless on top of the rocky hill facing the character

entered.detail: large rocky outcrop with steep sides rising from the coastal plain
humanoid figure standing atop the rocky hill silhouetted against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the arch into a wide open coastal area. The giant skeletal ribs now stand to the left as the character approaches a rocky hill. A figure stands motionless atop the hill, silhouetted against the purple sky as the character draws closer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a claustrophobic rocky canyon into a vast, open coastal expanse under a purple dusk sky. It begins with the character traversing a narrow passage of tall dark walls and wet, reflective sand, moving steadily toward a massive natural rock archway in the distance. As the character passes under the arch, the oppressive canyon walls fall away, transitioning the environment into an open landscape where the giant skeletal ribs of a creature begin to arch over the path. The scene then expands further into a wide coastal area, with the skeletal remains shifting to the left as the camera advances toward a rocky hill. Finally, the movement culminates in the approach toward a motionless figure silhouetted against the vibrant purple horizon.
